# matomo_tagmanager_tag_raygun (Resource)

Error, crash and performance monitoring software.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example Raygun Site"
  urls = ["https://example-raygun.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example Raygun Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_trigger" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  type         = "PageView"
  name         = "Example Raygun Trigger"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_tag_raygun" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-raygun"
  fire_trigger_ids = [matomo_tagmanager_trigger.example.id]
  raygun_api_key = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `fire_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `name` (String)
- `raygun_api_key` (String) When you create a new application in your Raygun dashboard, your app API key is displayed at the top of the instructions page. You can also find the API key by clicking the "Application Settings" button in the side bar of the Raygun dashboard.

### Optional

- `block_trigger_ids` (List of String)
- `raygun_enable_pulse` (Boolean) Automatically identify front end performance issues causing slow page load speeds. See what your users see in the browser and discover why users had poor quality experiences.
- `status` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
